text: I feel a quiet curiosity here, moving from the liminal, almost clinical hallway into a vibrant and cerebral space alive with ideas. The glass barrier suggests separation but also transparency, while the colorful display inside beckons me toward inquiry and innovation. Surrounded by symbols of research and development, I am reminded of the ceaseless human desire to connect, explore, and understand. Here, technology and contemplation coexist, inviting me to linger in possibility.
